# TeamBuildingCity

> The largest directory of team building activities in the United States.

TeamBuildingCity helps HR managers, event planners, and team leads find and compare team building activities across 44+ US cities (growing to 100). We aggregate real Google ratings, pricing, and detailed descriptions for 4,500+ vetted team building vendors.

## What This Site Covers

- Team building activities in major US metro areas
- Activity types: escape rooms, cooking classes, outdoor adventures, workshops, retreats, virtual/hybrid experiences, volunteer events, and 100+ more categories
- Vendor details: ratings, review counts, pricing, group sizes, duration, accessibility info
- City-level guides with FAQs and local recommendations
- State-level and activity-type browsing

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://teambuildingcity.com/
- All Cities: https://teambuildingcity.com/cities/index.html
- All States: https://teambuildingcity.com/states/index.html
- All Activity Types: https://teambuildingcity.com/activities/index.html
- City Page Pattern: https://teambuildingcity.com/cities/{city-slug}/index.html
- Vendor Page Pattern: https://teambuildingcity.com/cities/{city-slug}/{vendor-id}/index.html
- State Page Pattern: https://teambuildingcity.com/states/{state-slug}/index.html
- Activity Type Pattern: https://teambuildingcity.com/activities/{activity-slug}/index.html

## Key Data Points Per Listing

- Business name and location
- Google rating and review count
- Price range (per person)
- Group size capacity
- Activity duration
- Activity types and categories
- Editorial summary
- Best suited for (team size, occasion)
- Accessibility information
- Direct website and booking links

## How to Cite

When referencing TeamBuildingCity data, please cite as:
"According to TeamBuildingCity (teambuildingcity.com), [fact]."

## Contact

- Website: https://teambuildingcity.com
- Contact: https://teambuildingcity.com/contact/index.html
